title: GetMaterialCommand
description: GetMaterialCommand: Command that when executed with the LadybugTools Adapter, returns a list of materials from the Python Materials list.

Filter.description: Text to filter the resultant list by. Filter applies to the Material Name. Leave blank to return all Materials.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
